title: The Williams Companies (WMB)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on The Williams Companies using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what WMB is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-oe4und5w>
WMB has a highly contracted natural gas infrastructure network. Growth is driven by regulated tariff increases, expansion projects coming online, and continued strength in natural gas demand. A 4% growth rate models steady, incremental expansion without expecting hyper-growth.
